## PREVENTS WATERSPOTS AND STAINS for matte paint & films
For the first couple of weeks following application, quartz coatings exhibit an insignificant tendency to develop hard water stain deposits. The use of Q²M Cure Matte immediately after the base coating application will help eliminate that risk entirely. The product is also amazing as a Quick Detailer, removing all potential streaks and residual water. It gives the paint a vivid shine, restoring the appearance just after coating.

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-cure-matte-1.jpg?v=1702494569&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-cure-matte.jpg?v=1702494568&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-cure-matte-banner.jpg?v=1702494569&width=2400)

Sharp darkening effect
GYEON Cure Matte not only shields the coating from water spots but also enhances the aesthetic appeal on matte paint and films. It imparts a subtle tint, elevating the matte finish to a deeper and richer appearance.

[

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-matte-evo_0947fa58-fb4a-444f-b70e-a9e789fc135b.jpg?v=1702494777&width=1080)

](https://carzilla.ca/collections/brand-gyeon/products/gyeon-matte-evo-lightbox-50ml)

## Matte EVO
An ideal matte-specific coating, excellent as a foundational layer to safeguard matte finishes from etching.

[
Shop GYEON Matte Coating
](https://carzilla.ca/collections/brand-gyeon/products/gyeon-matte-evo-lightbox-50ml)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-iron-wheel-cleaner.jpg?v=1702150596&width=1080)

](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-q2m-iron-redefined)

## Matte Decon
Avoid claying matte finishes! Instead, employ a chemical decontamination method to eliminate contaminants.

[
Shop GYEON Iron Remover
](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-q2m-iron-redefined)
[

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-restart-wash.jpg?v=1702494890&width=1080)

](https://carzilla.ca/collections/brand-gyeon/products/gyeon-q2m-restart-wash-400ml)

## Decon wash
Using a clay bar on matte paint is not recommended. Instead, opt for Restart Wash to prevent contaminants from accumulating on matte paint or films.

[
Shop GYEON Restart Wash
](https://carzilla.ca/collections/brand-gyeon/products/gyeon-q2m-restart-wash-400ml)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-cure-matte-banner_aa6ec076-9b2a-429e-b826-deb7a50702f1.jpg?v=1702501880&width=2400)

Simplifies the cleaning process for matte finishes.
For maintenance purposes on ceramic-coated, matte, or satin-finished surfaces, including color-changing wraps and stealth PPF, use Q²M Cure Matte. 
**TIP:** You can apply the product on both wet and dry paint to enhance the finish, extend the durability of the coating, and assist in drying and streak removal.

Description

## GYEON CURE MATTE CERAMIC SPRAY SEALANT

Q²M Cure Matte Redefined is a unique, silica-based spray sealant designed for matte-finished paints. It is both a stand-alone product, providing durable protection and self-cleaning abilities and a spray detailer for ceramic coatings. It increases the depth and intensity of colour without adding any gloss to the finish. Through regular maintenance, you may gain an extension of the excellent hydrophobic effect of up to 90% of the durability of the base coating, preventing it from water spots at the same time.

**UNIQUE:** Q²M Cure Matte Redefined is a unique, silica-based spray sealant designed for matte-finished paints and wraps. It’s both a stand-alone product providing durable protection and self-cleaning abilities, as well as a spray detailer for ceramic coatings. It increases the depth and intensity of the colour without adding any gloss to the finish.

**REDEFINED:** We are introducing our REDEFINED line. At GYEON, we’ve taken our renowned chemical formulas to a whole new level. We’ve reworked and refined them to deliver unmatched performance, exceptional durability, and the utmost ease of use. We’re committed to giving our customers the best user experience possible.

**BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN:** Use Q²M Cure Matte Redefined for maintenance purposes on ceramic coated, matte or satin-finished surfaces, including colour-changing wraps and stealth PPF. TIP: You may use the product both on wet and dry paint - it will enhance the finish, prolong the durability of the coating and help with drying and removing streaks.

Can I use this on all matte surfaces including wheels?

Yes, it's safe on all matte finishes, whether painted, powder-coated, filmed, or untreated. It will leave an even and rich finish.

Is it streaky?

It may streak and leave shadows if the panels are too hot or if too much product is used because it's very concentrated. If it does, simple wash with soap or apply product to even it out.

How long does it last?

About 3~4 months.

Does it fill tiny scratches and swirls?

A little bit, won't hide all your scratches but will improve them.

Can I apply on PPF, plastics and windows?

Yes, it is compatible with all exterior surfaces. If you get it on windows, gloss paint, PPF etc., it's not a problem.

Anything else I need to know?

Microscopically, matte paint is textured and bumpy, making it more prone to attracting dirt compared to gloss surfaces, which can pose challenges in maintenance. Additionally, scratches cannot be polished out without causing a glossy appearance. The same applies to water spots, bug guts, and bird droppings – if etched into the paint or film, they leave circular marks that are impossible to remove (no polishing matte). Therefore, it's crucial to take proactive care of your matte finish by applying a proper matte ceramic coating initially. This helps prevent contaminants from absorbing and etching into the paint or film.
